stemHtml: In PBN operations, both linear and angular lateral guidance can be used in the approach phase of flight, depending on the procedure and minima. The maximum allowable error or deviation from the planned track in this phase of flight is expressed in...

options.a: degrees needle deflection on the Course Deviation Indicator (CDI) for linear operation and cross-track lateral deviation in nautical miles for angular operation.
options.b: nautical miles for along track deviation for linear operation and in degrees needle deflection on the Course Deviation Indicator (CDI) for angular operation in the vertical plane.
options.c: nautical miles for cross track lateral deviation for linear operation and in degrees needle deflection on the Course Deviation Indicator (CDI) for angular operation.
options.d: degrees needle deflection on the Course Deviation Indicator (CDI) for both linear and angular operation.
